name: Ingest Health - Baseline Builder
description: Daily per-device baseline rebuild over 168h. Device = OCSF/host identity coalesce, falling back to source. Hour-of-day seasonal profile. Writes ingestHealthBaseline (per source+device+hour-of-day) and ingestHealthSourceStats (per source+device sigma + liveness). Datatable storage limit is 150MB (extensible via S1). Bind 'SentinelOne SDL' (Bearer).

data.name: Build Ingest Baseline
